_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Integrate information from cyber resources, internal partners, and external partners
reference_document_element_description: Ability to build cross-functional operational partnerships between data teams, IT infrastructure, business units, and vendor organizations to maintain effective data service delivery.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI OP domain. Ability OP-A-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-A-005 (DG, cosine: 0.449), RC-K-007 (RC, cosine: 0.443).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.0/10 (raw 0.597). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. NICE-only terms [cyber, external, information, integrate, internal, partners] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, build, business, cross, data, delivery] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.863 (P=0.870, R=0.857). Balanced P/R — the 10-word NICE element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:32.1%, N:67.8%, C:0.0%). No dominant classification for "Integrate information from cyber resources, internal partners, and external part" vs "Ability to build cross-functional operational partnerships between data teams, I" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.517 < STS 0.597 (gap -0.080). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [cyber, external, information] and [ability, build, business] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.5%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. NICE terms: [cyber, external, information, integrate, internal, partners]. WIDAI terms: [ability, build, business, cross, data, delivery].
